item.text: I’m checking the workspace manifests directly and will verify each consuming crate by reading its `Cargo.toml`, excluding the workspace root as requested.
The search found two likely consumers. I’m opening those manifests now to confirm the dependency appears in a direct dependency section rather than only somewhere incidental.
